titleStmt.title: SII 22.135: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 135. (A.R. No. 135 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶA I—13th YEAR (A.D. 1024-5).

summary.p: This is stated to have its introduction Tirumanni vaḷara etc. which is however not given. It registers an endowment of 30 kāśu to the temple of Ūruḍaiya-Paramēśvara at Iṟaiyānaraiyūr a brahmadēya and dēvanāṭchi (dēvadāna ?) in Pānūrkūṟṟam a division of Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, made by an officer of the king by name Kiḻavaṉ Chaturanār alias Vānavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷār who is referred to as a native of Vannikuḍi in Kīḻchchembai-nāḍu a division of Rājarāja-Pāṉḍināḍu. The sabhā of the place who received the amount were to carry out the renovation of the Aindiram (Vāhana) of the procession image of the god, the two side roads and the smaller and bigger maṇḍapas with their walls lime and colour washed once in every ten years with the accumulated interest on the amount endowed, at 6 kāśu per year (i.e., at 20 per cent per annum).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumanni vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum Ennum śrīmaikkitti Eḻuti Uṭaiyār śrī rāje
ntracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭu kkiḻccempi nāṭṭu vannikuṭi
uṭaiyār śrī rājentracoḻadevar Atikārikaḷ kiḻavan caturanārān vānavan muventa veḷār malā
ṭāna jenanātavaḷanāṭṭu pānūrkkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam tevanāṭci Iṟaiyānaraiyūr Ūruṭaiya
parameśvaraṟkuk kuṭutta kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatum devar paṇṭāratte koṇṭu Iṟaiyā
naraiyūr sabhaiyom yāṇṭu 10 3Āvatu kanni nāyaṟumutal Ikkācu muppatukku Orāṭ
ṭaikku Āṟukācu Āka Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum palicaiyāvatākavum Ippalicai polivatā
kavum Ippalicaiyāl vanta kācu Orāṭṭaikkācu Āṟākap patiṟṟāṇṭu ponapin palicaiyāl vanta
kācu Aṟupatu niṟampinavāṟe Aṟupatu kācālum Immahādevar Eṟi valañ ceyyum Ayintiramu
m Iraṇṭu pakka cālaikaḷum maṇṭapamum periya maṇṭapamum Uḷḷum puṟampum Iṭantara
Iṭam cāntiṭa veṇṭuñ cāntiṭṭu vaṇṇam pūcit tirukkoyilukku cantirātittaval laiya
m Ilātavaṇṇam patiṟṟāṇṭutoṟum palicaikkācāl cantirātittaval putukku I
vvūr sabhaiyom Itu paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.135 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
